text: Add circuit-breaker logic to supervisor-state.ts to reset or halt after N consecutive ERRORs to avoid retry ceiling
description: Current backoff in supervisor-state.ts increases but can still lead to repeated 'retry ceiling reached' in friction. Add logic: after e.g. 5 consecutive ERRORs without success, trigger a special state or log a limitation and suggest aim. Reset on success. This improves the supervisor in wrapped-agents for the ASI ideation aim.

status.comment: Added CIRCUIT_OPEN state to supervisor-state and state-machine-definition. Logic in transition to open circuit after 5 consecutive ERRORs. attemptAction blocks with message to auto-propose. Added isCircuitOpen, closeCircuit, triggerError guard. Updated prompts for CIRCUIT_OPEN to direct to create_aim/auto-propose. Type-check and tests pass. Ties to friction auto-propose and backoff.

reflection:
Implemented core circuit-breaker logic in supervisor-state.ts per the aim description:
- Extended SupervisorStateName with 'CIRCUIT_OPEN'.
- CIRCUIT_BREAKER_THRESHOLD = 5.
- In transition, when ERROR and errorCount >= threshold, redirect to CIRCUIT_OPEN.
- In attemptAction, special block for CIRCUIT_OPEN (backoffActive, suggest propose).
- Added isCircuitOpen(), closeCircuit() to reset after improvement.
- Updated triggerError to guard.
- Updated state-machine-definition.ts with circuitOpen state definition, instructions for auto-propose, actions.
- Updated supervisor-prompts.ts with specific alert for CIRCUIT_OPEN directing to create_aim MCP or auto-propose.

Evidence: type-check clean, tests 62/62 pass. No breakage to existing ERROR/backoff.

Next: integrate closeCircuit call after successful recovery or auto-propose apply; add unit test simulating ceiling; make threshold configurable via AutonomyPolicy; update watchdog handling if needed for state emission.
